title: Presio media sidecar
description: Embedded-file attachment named media-slide-{N}-{id}.json inside a Presio PDF. A companion binary attachment media-{id}.{gif|mp4|webm} is also embedded when kind is 'file'.

kind.description: Media source type. Inferred as 'url' when `url` is present and `kind` is omitted, otherwise 'file'.

id.description: Stable identifier derived from the source path or URL (non-alphanumeric chars replaced with _).

mime.description: MIME type of the media. YouTube/Vimeo use text/html.

x_pt.description: Left edge of the overlay in PDF points, top-left origin.

y_pt.description: Top edge of the overlay in PDF points, top-left origin.

w_pt.description: Width of the overlay in PDF points.

h_pt.description: Height of the overlay in PDF points.

autoplay.description: Start playing automatically when the slide is shown.

filename.description: Name of the companion binary attachment. Required when kind='file'.

url.description: Source URL. Required when kind='url', 'youtube', or 'vimeo'.

video_id.description: Extracted video ID used for iframe embeds. Present when kind='youtube' or 'vimeo'.
